name: setPriority
description: Set the priority of an incoming item in the configured issue tracker

itemId.description: Identifier of the item in the issue tracker

rationale.description: Short justification for the chosen priority

name: linkToTheme
description: Link an item to an existing roadmap theme

itemId.description: Identifier of the item in the issue tracker

name: assignToAgent
description: Assign an item to a specific agent in the unit for follow-up

agentId.description: Agent ID or role to assign to

itemId.description: Identifier of the item being assigned
